description: The user hovers over the 'Short answer' option in the custom question type dropdown menu.
frame_description: The 'Custom screener' page is visible with a dropdown menu open showing question types.

description: The user selects 'Short answer' from the question type dropdown menu.
frame_description: The user clicks on the 'Short answer' option in the dropdown.

description: A modal window titled 'Short answer' appears on the screen for creating a new screener question.
frame_description: The 'Short answer' modal is now visible over the dimmed background of the screener page.

description: The user types the question 'What is the name of your favourite TV show that you're watching right now?' into the 'Screener question' field.
frame_description: The user is actively typing into the text area within the modal.

description: The user hovers the cursor over the 'Save' button in the 'Short answer' modal.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Save' button at the bottom right of the modal.

description: The user clicks the 'Save' button to add the short answer question.
frame_description: The 'Save' button is clicked.

description: The modal closes and the new question is added to the list on the 'Custom screener' page.
frame_description: The modal has disappeared and the screener list now shows two questions.

description: The user hovers over the '+ Add another custom question' button.
frame_description: The cursor is over the button to add a new question.

description: The user clicks '+ Add another custom question' to open the question type menu.
frame_description: The user clicks the button.

description: A dropdown menu appears with options for question types.
frame_description: The question type dropdown menu is now visible.

description: The user selects 'Multiple choice' from the dropdown menu.
frame_description: The user clicks 'Multiple choice' in the menu.

description: A modal window titled 'Multiple Choice' appears on the screen.
frame_description: The 'Multiple Choice' modal is now visible.

description: The user types the question 'Which streaming service are you using most right now?' into the 'Screener question' field.
frame_description: The user is typing the question in the modal.

description: The user hovers over the first answer input field.
frame_description: The cursor is over the first answer field.

description: The user clicks into the first answer field to begin typing.
frame_description: The first answer field is focused.

description: The user types 'Netflix' as the first answer option.
frame_description: The text 'Netflix' appears in the first answer field.

description: The user hovers over the second answer input field.
frame_description: The cursor is over the second answer field.

description: The user clicks into the second answer field.
frame_description: The second answer field is focused.

description: The user types 'Stan' as the second answer option.
frame_description: The text 'Stan' appears in the second answer field.

description: The user hovers over the third answer input field.
frame_description: The cursor is over the third answer field.

description: The user clicks into the third answer field.
frame_description: The third answer field is focused.

description: The user types 'Disney+' as the third answer option.
frame_description: The text 'Disney+' appears in the third answer field.

description: The user hovers over the fourth answer input field for a significant duration, likely considering the next option.
frame_description: The cursor remains over the fourth answer field while the user pauses.

description: The user clicks into the fourth answer field.
frame_description: The fourth answer field is focused.

description: The user types 'Prime Video' as the fourth answer option.
frame_description: The text 'Prime Video' appears in the fourth answer field.

description: The user hovers over the 'Save' button in the 'Multiple Choice' modal.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Save' button.

description: The user clicks the 'Save' button to add the multiple choice question.
frame_description: The 'Save' button is clicked.

description: The modal closes and the screener list updates to show three custom questions.
frame_description: The modal has closed and the list of questions is updated.

description: The user hovers over the 'Next' button at the bottom of the page.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Next' button.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to the next section.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked.

description: The page navigates from 'Custom screener' to 'Additional Info'.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the 'Additional Info' section, specifically the 'Your Timezone' sub-page.

description: The 'Your Timezone' page finishes loading.
frame_description: The page content is fully rendered.

description: The user hovers over the 'Next' button on the 'Your Timezone' page.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Next' button.

description: The user clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked.

description: The page navigates to the 'Description' sub-section of 'Additional Info'.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the 'Description' page.
